mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fiber_raw_data (sensor_id, device_no, fiber_no, raw_value, wavelength, wavelength_shift, intensity, collect_time, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{sensorId}, #{deviceNo}, #{fiberNo}, #{rawValue}, #{wavelength}, #{wavelengthShift}, #{intensity}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, device_no AS deviceNo, fiber_no AS fiberNo, raw_value AS rawValue, wavelength AS wavelength, wavelength_shift AS wavelengthShift, intensity AS intensity, collect_time AS collectTime FROM fiber_raw_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
